title: Global existence and uniqueness of weak solutions for the MHD equations with large $L^3$-initial values
summary: This paper is concerned with the weak solution theory for the MHD system with large $L^3$-initial data. Due to the fact that the natural boundary condition on the magnetic field $H$ is the slip boundary condition, the Leray-Schauder fixed-point theorem, which have used to investigate the weak solution theory of the Navier-Stokes system, becomes invalid. To address such difficulty, we will invoke the Leray's approximation technique and the perturbation theory to seek a global weak solution to the Cauchy problem for MHD equations with large $L^3$-initial data. Our strategy provides a simple alternative (self-contained) proof of weak $L^3$-solution theory of incompressible Navier-Stokes system. Moreover, this weak solution is unique under some restrictions.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过Leray逼近技术和扰动理论，解决了具有大L^3初值的MHD系统全局弱解存在性问题，并提供了Navier-Stokes系统弱解理论的自包含证明。
AI.motivation: 研究具有大L^3初值的MHD系统弱解理论，由于磁场H的自然边界条件是滑移边界条件，使得Navier-Stokes系统中使用的Leray-Schauder不动点定理失效，需要新的方法处理这一困难。
AI.techniques: 主要采用Leray逼近技术和扰动理论，通过近似方法和扰动分析来构造全局弱解，避免了传统不动点定理在滑移边界条件下的失效问题。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了具有大L^3初值的MHD方程Cauchy问题全局弱解的存在性，并在一定限制条件下证明了弱解的唯一性；同时为不可压缩Navier-Stokes系统的弱L^3解理论提供了简洁的自包含证明。
AI.significance: 解决了MHD系统在滑移边界条件下弱解构造的理论困难，发展了处理此类问题的技术框架，对磁流体力学方程的理论研究具有重要意义，同时为Navier-Stokes方程提供了新的证明方法。

title: Semiclassical localization of Schrödinger's eigenfunctions
summary: This article addresses the microlocalization of eigenfunctions for the semiclassical Schrödinger operator $-h^2Δ+V$ on closed Riemann surfaces with real bounded potentials. Our primary aim is to establish quantitative bounds on the spatial concentration of these eigenfunctions, extending classical results, typically restricted to smooth potentials, to the more general case where the potential is merely bounded. Our main result provides an explicit exponential bound for the $L^2$-norm of eigenfunctions on the entire surface in terms of their $L^2$-norm on an arbitrary open subset with an exponential weight of $Ch^{-1}\log(h)^2$. This bound improves upon previous estimates for non-smooth potentials that was an exponential weight of $Ch^{-4/3}$. Our proof is based on a recent approach of the Landis conjecture develop by Logunov, Malinnikova, Nadirashvili and Nazarov (2025).

AI.tldr: 该论文将半经典薛定谔算子的特征函数微局部分析从光滑势能推广到有界势能，并改进了非光滑势能下的指数衰减估计。
AI.motivation: 研究闭黎曼曲面上半经典薛定谔算子特征函数的空间集中性定量估计，将经典结果从光滑势能推广到仅需有界势能的情形，解决非光滑势能下特征函数微局部分析的理论挑战。
AI.techniques: 基于Logunov、Malinnikova、Nadirashvili和Nazarov（2025）发展的Landis猜想新方法，结合半经典分析和微局部分析技术，处理有界势能下的特征函数估计问题。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了特征函数在全曲面上的L^2范数与任意开子集上L^2范数之间的显式指数界，指数权重为Ch^{-1}log(h)^2，改进了先前非光滑势能下的Ch^{-4/3}指数权重估计。
AI.significance: 将特征函数微局部分析推广到更一般的非光滑势能情形，为量子混沌和谱理论提供更广泛适用的定量工具，改进了Landis猜想相关方法在半经典分析中的应用。

title: Pointwise Hadamard variational formula for the fractional Laplacian
summary: We establish pointwise formulas for the shape derivative of solutions to the Dirichlet problem associated with the fractional Laplacian. Specifically, we consider the equation $(-Δ)^s u = h$ in $Ω$ and $u=0$ in $Ω^c$, where the right-hand side $h$ is either a Dirac delta distribution or a Lipschitz function. In both cases, we prove that the corresponding solution is shape differentiable in every direction and we derive a formula for the pointwise value of its shape derivative. These formulas involve integral on the domain's boundary and fractional Neumann's traces. This extends to the case of the fractional Laplacian the well-known Hadamard variational formula for the standard Laplacian. Our argument is in the spirit of \cite{Ushikoshi, Kozono-Ushikoshi} and is based on PDEs techniques.

AI.tldr: 建立了分数阶拉普拉斯算子Dirichlet问题解的形导数点态公式，推广了经典拉普拉斯的Hadamard变分公式
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶拉普拉斯算子Dirichlet问题解的形导数，推广经典拉普拉斯算子的Hadamard变分公式到分数阶情形，解决右端项为Dirac delta分布或Lipschitz函数时解的形导数计算问题
AI.techniques: 基于PDE技术，采用Ushikoshi和Kozono-Ushikoshi的方法，涉及边界积分和分数阶Neumann迹，通过变分公式和积分表示推导形导数
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在Dirac delta分布或Lipschitz函数作为右端项时，分数阶拉普拉斯Dirichlet问题的解在所有方向上都形可微，并给出了形导数的点态计算公式，该公式包含边界积分和分数阶Neumann迹
AI.significance: 将经典拉普拉斯算子的Hadamard变分公式推广到分数阶情形，为分数阶PDE的形状优化和灵敏度分析提供理论基础，扩展了分数阶微积分在形状分析中的应用

title: A Brezis and Peletier type result for the fractional Robin function
summary: This paper is devoted to the Laplacian operator of fractional order $s\in (0,1)$ in several dimensions. We consider the equation $(-Δ)^su=f(x,u)$ in $Ω$, $u=0$ in $Ω^c$ and establish a representation formula for partial derivatives of solutions in terms of the normal derivative $u/δ^s$. As a consequence, we prove that solutions to the overdetermined problem $(-Δ)^su=f(x,u)$ in $Ω$, $u=0$ in $Ω^c$, and $u/δ^s=0$ on $\partialΩ$ are globally Lipschitz continuous provided that $2s>1$. We also prove a Pohozaev-type identity for the Green function and, in particular, obtain a formula for the gradient of the Robin function, which extends to the fractional setting some results obtained by Brézis and Peletier in \cite{Bresiz} in the classical case of the Laplacian. Finally, an application to the nondegeneracy of critical points of the fractional Robin function in symmetric domains is discussed.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了分数阶拉普拉斯算子解的偏导数表示公式，证明了超定问题解的全局Lipschitz连续性，并推广了经典拉普拉斯算子的Brézis-Peletier结果到分数阶情形。
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶拉普拉斯算子$(-Δ)^s$在超定边值问题中的性质，特别是解的偏导数表示、正则性以及Robin函数的梯度公式，将经典拉普拉斯算子的Brézis-Peletier结果推广到分数阶情形。
AI.techniques: 分数阶拉普拉斯算子的表示公式、偏导数估计、Pohozaev型恒等式、Green函数分析、Robin函数梯度计算、对称域中的临界点非退化性分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了分数阶拉普拉斯算子解的偏导数关于法向导数$u/δ^s$的表示公式；2. 证明了当$2s>1$时超定问题解的全局Lipschitz连续性；3. 建立了Green函数的Pohozaev型恒等式和Robin函数梯度公式；4. 讨论了对称域中分数阶Robin函数临界点的非退化性。
AI.significance: 将经典拉普拉斯算子的Brézis-Peletier结果系统性地推广到分数阶情形，为分数阶偏微分方程的正则性理论和超定问题研究提供了新工具，对分数阶几何分析和临界点理论有重要贡献。

title: Non-homogeneous boundary value problems for second-order degenerate hyperbolic equations and their application
summary: We study second-order hyperbolic equations with degenerate elliptic operators and non-homogeneous Dirichlet boundary inputs. We establish existence and regularity of weak solutions in weighted Sobolev spaces under mild assumptions on the degenerate weight. A Dirichlet map is constructed for the degenerate elliptic operator, leading to a solution theory that extends classical approaches to the degenerate setting. In particular, we derive energy estimates and well-posedness for boundary inputs of low regularity (in appropriate trace spaces), even though the classical Dirichlet-to-Neumann framework is not directly applicable in the degenerate setting. As an application, we prove an approximate controllability criterion, which generalizes the Hilbert Uniqueness Method to degenerate wave equations. Our framework accommodates higher-dimensional degenerate waves, non-homogeneous boundary conditions, and weighted functional analysis. We also illustrate how our criterion connects to higher-dimensional Grushin equations and waves with single-point degeneracy, and we highlight the remaining unique continuation/observability issue as an open problem.

AI.tldr: 建立了退化椭圆算子的二阶双曲方程在加权Sobolev空间中的弱解存在性、正则性和近似可控性理论
AI.motivation: 研究具有退化椭圆算子的二阶双曲方程，处理非齐次Dirichlet边界输入，扩展经典理论到退化情形，解决退化权重下边界输入低正则性的问题
AI.techniques: 加权Sobolev空间理论，退化椭圆算子的Dirichlet映射构造，能量估计方法，Hilbert唯一性方法的推广，近似可控性准则
AI.main_theorems: 在退化权重温和假设下建立弱解存在性和正则性；构造退化椭圆算子的Dirichlet映射；推导能量估计和适定性；证明近似可控性准则，将Hilbert唯一性方法推广到退化波动方程
AI.significance: 为退化双曲方程提供了系统的解理论框架，处理了高维退化波动、非齐次边界条件和加权泛函分析，连接Grushin方程和单点退化波动，指出了唯一延拓/可观测性问题作为开放问题

title: On two-dimensional steady compactly supported Euler flows with constant vorticity
summary: In this paper, we mainly construct local solution curves for the two-dimensional steady compactly supported incompressible Euler equations with free boundaries and constant vorticity. Our work is distinguished from most existing studies on two-dimensional steady water waves by its focus on perturbations near annular flows, rather than laminar flows. More precisely, we consider three classes of steady Euler flows with compact support, corresponding to partially overdetermined, two-phase overdetermined, and overdetermined elliptic problems. The primary contribution of our work is threefold. For each class, we first establish the flexibility result (i.e., the existence of nontrivial admissible domains) via shape derivatives and local bifurcation theory. Second, we give and discuss the corresponding rigidity result respectively. Third, we apply the implicit function theorem to demonstrate the stability of standard annular flows under perturbations of the Neumann boundary condition. Our results also offer novel insights into the theory of elliptic overdetermined problems.

AI.tldr: 构造了具有自由边界和常涡度的二维稳态紧支撑不可压缩欧拉方程的三类局部解曲线
AI.motivation: 研究二维稳态紧支撑不可压缩欧拉方程的自由边界问题，区别于大多数现有二维稳态水波研究关注层流，本文聚焦于环状流附近的扰动
AI.techniques: 形状导数、局部分歧理论、隐函数定理、椭圆过定问题分析方法
AI.main_theorems: 针对三类稳态欧拉流（部分过定、两相过定、过定椭圆问题）分别建立了灵活性结果（非平凡容许域存在性）、刚性结果，并证明了标准环状流在Neumann边界条件扰动下的稳定性
AI.significance: 为椭圆过定问题理论提供了新见解，拓展了二维稳态水波研究框架，从环状流角度而非传统层流角度分析自由边界问题

title: A priori estimates for general elliptic and parabolic boundary value problems over irregular domains
summary: We investigate the realization of a myriad of general local and nonlocal inhomogeneous elliptic and parabolic boundary value problems over classes of irregular regions. We present a unified approach in which either local or nonlocal Neumann, Robin, and Wentzell boundary value problems are treated simultaneously. We establish solvability and global regularity results for both the stationary and time-dependent heat equations governed by general differential operators with unbounded measurable coefficients and various boundary conditions at once, first on a general framework, and then by presenting concrete important examples of irregular domains, Wentzell-type boundary conditions, and nonlocal maps. As a consequence, we develop a priori estimates for multiple differential equations under various situations, which are tied to a large number of applications performed over real world regions, such heat transfer, electrical conductivity, stable-like processes (probability theory), diffusion of medical sprays in the bronchial trees, and oceanography (among many others).

AI.tldr: 提出统一框架处理不规则区域上局部与非局部椭圆/抛物型边值问题，建立可解性与正则性结果
AI.motivation: 研究不规则区域上各类局部与非局部椭圆/抛物型边值问题的统一处理，包括Neumann、Robin、Wentzell边界条件，应用于热传导、电导率、概率论稳定过程、支气管喷雾扩散、海洋学等实际问题
AI.techniques: 统一框架方法，处理无界可测系数微分算子，同时考虑局部与非局部边界条件，建立先验估计，包含Wentzell型边界条件和非局部映射的具体例子
AI.main_theorems: 建立定常和时变热方程在一般框架下的可解性与全局正则性结果，针对不规则区域、Wentzell型边界条件和非局部映射给出具体重要例子，发展多种微分方程的先验估计
AI.significance: 为不规则区域上的局部与非局部边值问题提供统一理论框架，连接数学理论与实际应用，在热传导、电导率、概率论、医学、海洋学等领域有广泛应用价值

title: Well-posedness of Generalized Fractional Singular Burgers equation driven by $|D|^{\frac{1}{2}}ξ$
summary: In this paper, we study the generalized solution of Fractional Singular Burgers equation driving by $\vert D\vert^{\frac{1}{2}}ξ$. We establish a framework to describe the equations satisfied by generalized solutions, termed the Generalized Fractional Singular Burgers equation(GFSB), and prove its local well-posedness. Finally, we prove that the solution of GFSB can be the generalized solution of Fractional Singular Burgers equation for $γ>\frac{3}{2}$.

AI.tldr: 建立了分数阶奇异Burgers方程广义解的理论框架，证明了广义分数阶奇异Burgers方程的局部适定性，并给出了广义解存在的参数条件
AI.motivation: 研究由$\vert D\vert^{\frac{1}{2}}ξ$驱动的分数阶奇异Burgers方程的广义解问题，这类方程在流体力学和随机偏微分方程中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 建立了广义分数阶奇异Burgers方程(GFSB)的理论框架，使用泛函分析和偏微分方程理论，特别是处理分数阶导数和奇异项的技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了GFSB方程的理论框架；2. 证明了GFSB方程的局部适定性；3. 证明了当$γ>\frac{3}{2}$时，GFSB的解可以成为原分数阶奇异Burgers方程的广义解
AI.significance: 为分数阶奇异Burgers方程的广义解理论提供了系统框架，扩展了奇异偏微分方程解的存在性理论，对随机偏微分方程和流体力学研究有重要意义

title: Normalized Standing Waves for the Focusing Inhomogeneous Schrödinger Equation with Spatially Growing Nonlinearity
summary:
We study the focusing inhomogeneous nonlinear Schrödinger equation $$ i\partial_t u + Δu = -|x|^b |u|^{p-1}u ,\quad (t,x)\in (0,\infty)\times\mathbb{R}^N, $$ with $b>0$ and $p>1$. Due to the spatial growth of the nonlinearity, standard compactness arguments do not apply and new difficulties arise.
  We first characterize ground state standing waves via a variational approach on the Nehari manifold and we establish some sharp stability and instability properties. In the $L^2$-subcritical regime, we prove the existence of normalized ground states by solving a constrained energy minimization problem in the radial energy space, and we show that the resulting set of minimizers is orbitally stable under the flow. In contrast, in the $L^2$-critical and supercritical regimes, ground state standing waves are shown to be strongly unstable by finite-time blow-up.
  Our results extend classical stability and instability theory for nonlinear Schrödinger equations to the case of spatially growing inhomogeneous nonlinearities.

AI.tldr: 建立了聚焦非齐次非线性薛定谔方程基态驻波的变分刻画，证明了在L^2次临界情形下归一化基态的存在性和轨道稳定性，在L^2临界和超临界情形下基态驻波的强不稳定性（有限时间爆破）
AI.motivation: 研究具有空间增长非线性项的聚焦非齐次非线性薛定谔方程，由于非线性项的空间增长特性，标准紧性论证不再适用，需要克服新的数学困难
AI.techniques: Nehari流形上的变分方法、约束能量极小化问题、径向能量空间分析、轨道稳定性理论、有限时间爆破分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 通过Nehari流形变分方法刻画基态驻波；2. 在L^2次临界情形证明归一化基态存在性及轨道稳定性；3. 在L^2临界和超临界情形证明基态驻波的强不稳定性（有限时间爆破）
AI.significance: 将经典非线性薛定谔方程的稳定性与不稳定性理论推广到具有空间增长非齐次非线性项的情形，为处理此类非标准非线性项提供了新的数学框架

title: The Dirichlet problem as the boundary of the Poisson problem: A sharp approximation result
summary:
On a bounded domain $Ω\subset\mathbb R^{n+1}$, $n\geq2$, satisfying the corkscrew condition and with Ahlfors regular boundary, we characterize the dual space to the space ${\bf N}_{2,p}$ of functions $u$ whose Kenig-Pipher modified non-tangential maximal operator $\mathcal N_2(u)$ lies in $L^p(\partialΩ)$, $p\in(1,\infty)$. We find that \[ ({\bf N}_{2,p})^*={\bf C}_{2,p'}\oplus L^{p'}(\partialΩ),\qquad\text{and that}\qquad L^{p'}(\partialΩ)=\partial^{\operatorname{weak}-*}{\bf C}_{2,p'}\,/\,{\bf C}_{2,p'}, \] where ${\bf C}_{2,p'}$ is a certain $L^{p'}$-Carleson space and $p'$ is the Hölder conjugate of $p$. This answers a question considered by Hytönen and Rosén.
  Inspired by this result and the recently understood characterizations of the $L^p$-solvability of the Dirichlet problem in terms of the Poisson problem by Mourgoglou, Poggi, and Tolsa, we show a novel approximation result: for an arbitrary elliptic operator $L=-\operatorname{div} A\nabla$ with a not necessarily symmetric matrix $A$ of real bounded measurable coefficients, the solution space to the Dirichlet problem with data in $L^p(\partialΩ)$ \[
  \left\{\begin{aligned}-\operatorname{div} A\nabla u&=0,\quad&\text{in }&Ω,\\u&=g,\quad&\text{on }&\partialΩ,\end{aligned}\right. \]
  lies on the weak-$*$ boundary in ${\bf N}_{2,p}$ of the solution space to the Poisson problem \[ \left\{\begin{aligned}-\operatorname{div} A\nabla w&=-\operatorname{div} F,\qquad&\text{in }&Ω,\\ w&=0,\qquad&\text{on }&\partialΩ,\end{aligned}\right. \] with $F\in{\bf C}_{2,p}$, provided that the Dirichlet problem for $L$ with data in $L^p(\partialΩ)$ is solvable in $Ω$. This approximation result is sharp and new even for the Laplacian and on the unit ball.

AI.tldr: 刻画了Kenig-Pipher修正非切向极大算子空间的对偶空间，并建立了Dirichlet问题解空间与Poisson问题解空间的弱*边界关系
AI.motivation: 研究有界区域上Kenig-Pipher修正非切向极大算子空间的对偶空间结构，解决Hytönen和Rosén提出的问题，并建立Dirichlet问题与Poisson问题解空间之间的近似关系
AI.techniques: 使用Carleson空间理论、对偶空间刻画、弱*拓扑方法、椭圆算子理论，以及非切向极大算子的分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明了${\bf N}_{2,p}$的对偶空间为${\bf C}_{2,p'}\oplus L^{p'}(\partialΩ)$；2. 建立了Dirichlet问题解空间与Poisson问题解空间在弱*边界上的近似关系
AI.significance: 解决了Hytönen和Rosén提出的公开问题，为椭圆边值问题的对偶理论提供了新视角，建立了Dirichlet问题与Poisson问题解空间之间的深刻联系，即使在Laplacian算子和单位球情形下也是全新的结果

title: A Weighted Regularity Criterion for Suitable Weak Solutions of Incompressible Non-Newtonian Fluids
summary: It establishes a regularity criterion for non-Newtonian fluids in $\mathbb{R}^3$ in terms of the weighted gradient of the velocity field, based on the Caffarelli--Kohn--Nirenberg inequality.

AI.tldr: 建立了基于Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg不等式的三维非牛顿流体速度场加权梯度正则性准则
AI.motivation: 研究非牛顿流体在三维空间中的正则性问题，这类流体具有复杂的非线性本构关系，其正则性理论比牛顿流体更具挑战性。需要建立新的正则性准则来理解解的全局存在性和奇异性。
AI.techniques: 主要运用Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg不等式，这是一种加权Sobolev型不等式，能够处理具有奇异权函数的函数空间。通过该不等式建立速度场加权梯度与解正则性之间的关系。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了三维非牛顿流体解的正则性准则：如果速度场的加权梯度满足特定的可积性条件（由Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg不等式刻画），则解保持正则性，不会产生奇异性。
AI.significance: 为非牛顿流体正则性理论提供了新的判别准则，将经典的Serrin型准则推广到加权梯度情形。该结果深化了对非牛顿流体奇异性形成机制的理解，并为相关数学物理问题的研究提供了新工具。

title: Nash-Stackelberg controllability for coupled systems of degenerate equations in non-cylindrical domains
summary: In this paper we investigate the Hierarchical null controllability of a coupled degenerate semilinear parabolic equation in domains which are moving in time. We show the local null controllability of the semilinear system using Liusternik's inverse function theorem. Nevertheless, the main difficulty is to adapt a Carleman estimate for the controllability of the linearized otimality system, using a Carleman inequality for degenerate non-autonomous equation obtanied by the authors previously.

AI.tldr: 证明了在时变区域中耦合退化半线性抛物方程组的局部零能控性
AI.motivation: 研究时变区域中耦合退化半线性抛物方程组的零能控问题，这类问题在具有移动边界的物理系统中具有重要应用
AI.techniques: 使用Liusternik逆函数定理处理非线性性，通过Carleman估计控制线性化最优性系统，特别是利用作者先前获得的退化非自治方程的Carleman不等式
AI.main_theorems: 证明了耦合退化半线性抛物方程组在时变区域中的局部零能控性
AI.significance: 扩展了退化抛物方程控制理论到更一般的时变区域情形，为具有移动边界的物理系统控制提供了理论工具

title: Integral Harnack estimates and the rate of extinction of singular fractional diffusion
summary: We prove several integral Harnack-type inequalities for local weak solutions of parabolic equations with measurable and bounded coefficients, describing singular s-fractional p-Laplacian diffusion. Then we apply the aforementioned estimates to evaluate the decay rate of the local mass and supremum of the solutions as they approach a possible extinction time. Yet we show consistency of our general decay estimates by studying the extinction phenomenon for weak solutions of the Cauchy-Dirichlet problem, by means of an approximation procedure that carefully avoids the use of an integrable time derivative.

AI.tldr: 证明了奇异s-分数阶p-Laplacian扩散抛物方程解的积分型Harnack不等式，并应用于分析解在可能熄灭时间附近的局部质量和上确界的衰减率。
AI.motivation: 研究具有可测有界系数的奇异s-分数阶p-Laplacian扩散抛物方程的局部弱解性质，特别是解的衰减行为和熄灭现象。
AI.techniques: 积分型Harnack不等式、局部质量衰减估计、上确界衰减分析、Cauchy-Dirichlet问题的逼近方法、避免使用可积时间导数的技巧。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 奇异s-分数阶p-Laplacian扩散方程解的积分型Harnack不等式；2) 解在可能熄灭时间附近的局部质量和上确界的衰减率估计；3) Cauchy-Dirichlet问题弱解熄灭现象的一致性分析。
AI.significance: 扩展了分数阶p-Laplacian方程的理论，为奇异扩散过程的熄灭现象提供了定量分析工具，发展了避免时间导数可积性假设的逼近方法。

title: Finding the convex envelope of a boundary datum using random geometric graphs
summary: In this paper we approximate the convex envelope of a boundary datum inside a bounded domain in the Euclidean space. We work with a random graph that is obtained as random points with uniform distribution that are connected by proximity ($x\sim y$ when $|x-y|<r$). On the graph we solve an equation (that approximate the first eigenvalue of the Hessian of a smooth function) with an exterior datum. Under appropriate assumptions on $r$ we show that the unique solution to the equation in the graph converges to the convex envelope of the boundary datum as the number of points goes to infinity.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于随机图的凸包络逼近方法，通过求解图上的方程来近似凸包络问题
AI.motivation: 研究如何在欧几里得空间有界域内逼近边界数据的凸包络，这是一个经典的凸分析和偏微分方程问题，传统方法涉及复杂的PDE求解
AI.techniques: 使用随机图方法：均匀分布的随机点通过邻近性连接（当|x-y|<r时连接），在图上求解近似Hessian矩阵第一特征值的方程，结合概率论和图论技术
AI.main_theorems: 在适当的r假设下，证明图上方程的唯一解随着点数趋于无穷收敛到边界数据的凸包络，建立了离散随机模型与连续凸包络问题之间的收敛性
AI.significance: 为凸包络计算提供了新的随机离散化方法，连接了图论、概率论与凸分析，可能为数值计算凸包络提供新算法，并推广到更一般的非线性PDE问题

title: Instability of shear flows with neutral embedded eigenvalues
summary: We study the linear stability of a class of monotone shear flows. When the associated Rayleigh operator possesses a neutral embedded eigenvalue, we show that solutions of the linearized system may exhibit arbitrarily large growth in both the $L^\infty$ and $L^2$ norms. Moreover, when the embedded eigenvalue is multiple, we prove that the instability becomes stronger and explicitly construct solutions that grow linearly in time. This instability originates from the non-normality of the Rayleigh operator.

AI.tldr: 证明了单调剪切流在Rayleigh算子具有嵌入中性特征值时，线性化系统解可在L∞和L²范数下任意大增长，多重特征值时甚至出现线性增长
AI.motivation: 研究单调剪切流的线性稳定性问题，特别关注Rayleigh算子具有嵌入中性特征值时的稳定性行为，这是流体稳定性理论中的经典问题
AI.techniques: 利用Rayleigh算子的非正规性分析，构造特殊解展示增长机制，处理嵌入特征值和多重特征值情况
AI.main_theorems: 1) 当Rayleigh算子具有中性嵌入特征值时，线性化系统解可在L∞和L²范数下任意大增长；2) 当嵌入特征值为多重时，存在线性时间增长解
AI.significance: 揭示了非正规Rayleigh算子导致的亚临界不稳定性机制，对剪切流稳定性理论有重要贡献，解释了即使特征值中性也可能出现大幅增长的现象

title: Relative entropy and slightly compressible Navier-Stokes dynamics of the Boltzmann equation
summary:
This paper shows that, in the formal level, the convergence of solutions of Boltzmann equation to solutions of the compressible Navier-Stokes system with small Mach number over the three-dimensional periodic domain $\mathbb{T}^3$,
  using the relative entropy method originated from Bardos, Golse, Levermore [{\em Comm. Pure Appl. Math.} {\bf 46} (1993) 667--753] and Yau [{\em Lett. Math. Phys.} {\bf 22} (1991) 63--80]. We discuss the evolution of the entropy which is relative to the local Maxwellian governed by the solution of slightly compressible Navier-Stokes system. This characterizes the convergence rate from Boltzmann equation to the incompressible Navier-Stokes system.

AI.tldr: 使用相对熵方法建立了玻尔兹曼方程解到小马赫数可压缩Navier-Stokes系统解的收敛性
AI.motivation: 研究玻尔兹曼方程到流体力学方程的极限收敛问题，特别是小马赫数下向可压缩Navier-Stokes系统的收敛，这是动理学理论与流体力学之间的基本数学联系
AI.techniques: 相对熵方法（源自Bardos-Golse-Levermore和Yau的工作），通过相对于由可压缩Navier-Stokes解决定的局部Maxwellian分布构造相对熵，分析其演化
AI.main_theorems: 在三维周期域上，建立了玻尔兹曼方程解到小马赫数可压缩Navier-Stokes系统解的收敛性，并给出了收敛速率
AI.significance: 为动理学方程到流体力学方程的极限收敛提供了严格的数学框架，深化了对稀薄气体动力学与连续介质力学之间联系的理解，相对熵方法成为处理此类收敛问题的有力工具

title: Transport-diffusion equations with irregular data and applications to stability estimates for second-order Hamilton-Jacobi PDEs
summary: This paper studies quantitative uniqueness properties in $L^p$ spaces for Fokker-Planck and transport-diffusion equations under two new assumptions on their velocity field $b=b(x,t)$. We first prove $L^p$-stability estimates for advection-diffusion PDEs when $\mathrm{div}(b)\in L^r_t(L^q_x)$ with $r\in[2,\infty]$ and $q\in[n/2,\infty)$ satisfying the compatibility condition $n/(2q)+1/r\leq 1$. We then prove a stability result in $L^\infty$ for solutions of viscous transport equations when $\mathrm{div}(b(t))$ fails to be integrable in time. We apply these properties to obtain new continuous dependence estimates for viscous Hamilton-Jacobi equations via integral methods. One of the main novelties in this latter setting is that the constants of the estimates are all explicit with respect to the data of the problem. These imply new uniqueness properties for diffusive Hamilton-Jacobi equations without relying on the theory of viscosity solutions.

AI.tldr: 该论文在两种新的速度场假设下，研究了Fokker-Planck方程和输运-扩散方程在L^p空间中的定量唯一性性质。
AI.motivation: 研究Fokker-Planck方程和输运-扩散方程的定量唯一性性质，特别是在速度场的散度具有特定正则性条件下的稳定性估计。传统方法通常依赖粘性解理论，本文旨在发展不依赖该理论的替代方法。
AI.techniques: 使用L^p稳定性估计、积分方法、散度条件分析（div(b)∈L^r_t(L^q_x)），以及显式常数构造技术。特别关注当div(b(t))在时间上不可积时的处理。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当div(b)∈L^r_t(L^q_x)且满足兼容条件n/(2q)+1/r≤1时，证明了平流-扩散PDE的L^p稳定性估计；2. 当div(b(t))在时间上不可积时，证明了粘性输运方程在L^∞中的稳定性结果；3. 获得了粘性Hamilton-Jacobi方程具有显式常数的连续依赖性估计。
AI.significance: 为扩散型Hamilton-Jacobi方程提供了不依赖粘性解理论的新唯一性证明方法，所有估计常数相对于问题数据都是显式的，这在理论和数值分析中具有重要意义。

title: Observability properties of the singular Grushin equation
summary: We study the observability properties of the Grushin equation with an inverse square potential, whose singularity occurs at the boundary of two-dimensional rectangular domains or in the interior of the domain in higher dimensions. In some specific configurations of the observation set, we obtain the exact minimal time of observability. The analysis we present relies on recent Carleman estimates obtained by K. Beauchard, J. Dardé, and S. Ervedoza. As a byproduct of these results, we observe, for the heat equation associated to the Laplace-Beltrami operator on almost-Riemannian manifolds, a dependence of the minimal time of observability on the dimension of the singularity.

AI.tldr: 研究Grushin方程在逆平方势下的可观测性，确定了特定观测集配置下的精确最小观测时间
AI.motivation: 研究Grushin方程在逆平方势下的可观测性问题，该势的奇异性出现在二维矩形区域的边界或高维区域的内部，探讨观测集配置对可观测性的影响
AI.techniques: 利用K. Beauchard、J. Dardé和S. Ervedoza最近获得的Carleman估计，分析Grushin方程在逆平方势下的可观测性
AI.main_theorems: 在特定观测集配置下获得了精确的最小观测时间，观察到几乎黎曼流形上Laplace-Beltrami算子热方程的最小观测时间对奇异性维度的依赖性
AI.significance: 揭示了奇异性维度对可观测性时间的影响，为Grushin方程和几乎黎曼几何中的控制理论问题提供了新的理论结果

title: Enhanced lifespan bounds for 1D quasilinear Klein-Gordon flows
summary: In this article we consider one-dimensional scalar quasilinear Klein--Gordon equations with general nonlinearities, on both $\mathbb{R}$ and $\mathbb{T}$. By employing a refined modified-energy framework of Ifrim and Tataru, we investigate long time lifespan bounds for small data solutions. Our main result asserts that solutions with small initial data of size $ε$ persist on the improved cubic timescale $|t| \lesssim ε^{-2}$ and satisfy sharp cubic energy estimates throughout this interval. We also establish difference bounds on the same time scale. In the case of $\mathbb{R}$, we are further able to use dispersion in order to extend the lifespan to $ε^{-4}$. This generalizes earlier results obtained by Delort in the semilinear case.

AI.tldr: 该文研究一维拟线性Klein-Gordon方程，将小初值解的寿命从线性时间尺度改进到立方时间尺度ε^{-2}，并在实数线上进一步延长到ε^{-4}。
AI.motivation: 研究一维拟线性Klein-Gordon方程在小初值条件下的长时间行为，推广Delort在半线性情况下的结果，探索拟线性项对解寿命的影响。
AI.techniques: 采用Ifrim和Tataru的精细化修正能量框架，结合色散估计（在实数线情况下），建立改进的能量估计和差异界。
AI.main_theorems: 主要结果：小初值（大小为ε）的解在立方时间尺度|t| ≲ ε^{-2}内存在，满足尖锐的立方能量估计；在实数线上进一步延长寿命到ε^{-4}；同时建立相同时间尺度上的差异界。
AI.significance: 将半线性结果推广到拟线性情形，提供了拟线性Klein-Gordon方程长时间行为的新理解，改进了小初值解的寿命估计，为相关非线性波动方程研究提供了新方法。

title: On the well-posedness of a certain model with two kernels appearing in the mathematical biology
summary: The work is devoted to establishing the global well-posedness in $W^{(1,2),2}(R\times R^{+})$ of the integro-differential problem involving the two nonlocal terms describing the diffusion and the production in the biological system in the presence of the transport term. Such model is relevant to the cell population dynamics in the Mathematical Biology. The proof is based on a fixed point technique.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有两个非局部项的积分-微分问题的全局适定性，该模型描述了生物系统中扩散和产生过程
AI.motivation: 研究数学生物学中细胞群体动力学模型，该模型包含描述扩散和产生的两个非局部项以及输运项，需要建立其全局适定性理论
AI.techniques: 基于不动点技术，在函数空间$W^{(1,2),2}(R\times R^{+})$中构造证明
AI.main_theorems: 证明了该积分-微分问题在$W^{(1,2),2}(R\times R^{+})$空间中的全局适定性
AI.significance: 为数学生物学中的细胞群体动力学模型提供了严格的数学基础，建立了非局部项与输运项耦合系统的适定性理论

authors: Rafael Granero-Belinchón y Juan Carlos Sampedro
title: A bifurcation theory approach to the nonlocal Kuramoto-Sivashinsky equation
summary:
We study the nonlocal Kuramoto-Sivashinsky equation on the one-dimensional torus,
  \[
  u_t+u u_x=Λ^{r}u-\varepsilon Λ^{s}u,\qquad x\in\mathbb T,
  \] where $\varepsilon>0$, $s>1$, $r\in[-1,s)$. We first prove local and global well-posedness for initial data in $H^{3}(\mathbb T)$. We then investigate the steady-state problem and show that the trivial branch undergoes bifurcation at the critical values $\varepsilon_k=k^{\,r-s}$, $k\in\mathbb N$. Using the Crandall-Rabinowitz theorem we obtain smooth local curves of nontrivial equilibria emanating from each $(\varepsilon_k,0)$ and compute the bifurcation direction. To address the global continuation of these branches we derive global a priori bounds and apply a global alternative based on the Fitzpatrick-Pejsachowicz-Rabier degree for Fredholm maps of index zero. In particular, for the component bifurcating from the first critical point we prove that its $\varepsilon$-projection contains the interval $(2^{r-s},1)$, yielding the existence of nontrivial steady states for that parameter range. We complement the theory with numerical continuation results illustrating the bifurcation diagram and solution profiles.

AI.tldr: 研究非局部Kuramoto-Sivashinsky方程在环面上的适定性、分岔分析和全局分支延拓
AI.motivation: 研究非局部Kuramoto-Sivashinsky方程在环面上的动力学行为，该方程包含非线性对流项、分数阶耗散项和反耗散项，是经典KS方程的非局部推广，在模式形成和湍流研究中具有重要意义。
AI.techniques: 使用Crandall-Rabinowitz分岔定理分析稳态分岔，应用Fitzpatrick-Pejsachowicz-Rabier度理论进行全局分支延拓，结合数值延拓方法验证理论结果。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了方程在H^3空间中的局部和全局适定性；建立了平凡解分支在临界值ε_k=k^{r-s}处的分岔行为；获得了从第一个临界点分岔出的分支的全局延拓结果，证明其ε投影包含区间(2^{r-s},1)。
AI.significance: 为非局部Kuramoto-Sivashinsky方程提供了完整的适定性和分岔理论框架，建立了全局分支延拓的严格数学理论，为理解该方程的模式形成机制提供了理论基础。

title: Stability of $L^p$ Dirichlet solvability under small bi-Lipschitz transformations of domains
summary: We show that small bi-Lipschitz deformations of a Lipschitz domain (with possibly large Lipschitz constant) preserve the solvability of the Dirichlet problem for the Laplacian with boundary data in $L^p$, for the same value of $p>1$. As a consequence, for all $p\in(1,\infty)$, we obtain the solvability of the $L^p$ Dirichlet problem for small Lipschitz perturbations of convex domains, thereby unifying two fundamentally different settings in which such results were previously known: convex and $C^1$ domains. The key ingredient and novelty of our approach is a construction of a change of variables based on a non-constant basis derived from the Green function, which encodes the geometry of the base domain.

AI.tldr: 证明了小双Lipschitz形变保持Laplace方程Dirichlet问题的L^p可解性，统一了凸区域和C^1区域两种不同情形
AI.motivation: 研究Lipschitz区域上Laplace方程Dirichlet问题L^p可解性的稳定性问题，特别是小形变是否保持可解性，旨在统一凸区域和C^1区域这两种已知情形
AI.techniques: 基于Green函数构造非恒定基的变量变换方法，该方法能编码基区域的几何信息，是证明的核心创新
AI.main_theorems: 1. 小双Lipschitz形变（即使原区域Lipschitz常数很大）保持Laplace方程Dirichlet问题在相同p>1时的L^p可解性；2. 对任意p∈(1,∞)，小Lipschitz扰动凸区域的Dirichlet问题L^p可解
AI.significance: 统一了凸区域和C^1区域两种不同几何背景下Dirichlet问题可解性的理论框架，为研究PDE在非光滑边界上的正则性提供了新工具和方法

title: Forced oscillation of a damped BBM equation posed on whole line in low regularity spaces
summary: In this manuscript, we would established in low regularity spaces $H^\ell, \ell\in [0,1)$, the existence and stability results of time-periodic solution of 1D Cauchy problem of forced damped Benjamin-Bona-Mahony equation (BBM). We use estimates from I-energy method to derive needed estimates in $H^\ell$ for the linearized problem, then convection term will be treated as perturbation of linear problem such that original Cauchy problem is solved.

AI.tldr: 在低正则性空间H^ℓ(ℓ∈[0,1))中建立一维强迫阻尼BBM方程时间周期解的存在性与稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究一维强迫阻尼Benjamin-Bona-Mahony方程在低正则性空间中的时间周期解问题，该方程是描述浅水波传播的重要数学模型，低正则性分析具有理论挑战性
AI.techniques: 使用I-能量方法估计线性化问题在H^ℓ空间中的先验估计，将对流项作为线性问题的扰动处理
AI.main_theorems: 在H^ℓ空间(ℓ∈[0,1))中证明一维强迫阻尼BBM方程时间周期解的存在性和稳定性结果
AI.significance: 扩展了BBM方程周期解理论到低正则性空间，为浅水波模型的数学分析提供了新的理论工具，具有重要的PDE理论价值

title: Remainder terms and sharp quantitative stability for a nonlocal Sobolev inequality on the Heisenberg group

AI.tldr: 本文研究了海森堡群上的非局部Sobolev不等式的梯度型余项和临界点的定量稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究海森堡群上的Hardy-Littlewood-Sobolev型非局部Sobolev不等式，该不等式与Folland-Stein-Sobolev不等式相关，其对应的Euler-Lagrange方程是非局部方程。目标是建立该不等式的梯度型余项和临界点的定量稳定性。
AI.techniques: 使用海森堡群上的分析工具，包括Folland-Stein-Sobolev空间、次椭圆Laplacian算子、Hardy-Littlewood-Sobolev不等式技术，以及临界点理论和多气泡分解方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当Q≥4且μ∈(0,4]时，证明了非局部Sobolev不等式存在梯度型余项；2. 作为推论，在有界域上得到了弱L^{Q/(Q-2)}范数下的余项；3. 当Q=4且μ∈(2,4)时，建立了多气泡情况下临界点的定量稳定性
AI.significance: 扩展了欧氏空间中经典Sobolev不等式余项理论到海森堡群上的非局部情形，为研究次椭圆算子和非局部方程提供了新的稳定性结果，对理解临界点的结构有重要意义

title: $C^{1,α}$-regularity for Mixed Local and Nonlocal Degenerate Elliptic Equations in the Heisenberg Group
summary: The regularity theory for equations combining both local and nonlocal operators in sub-Riemannian geometries is a huge challenge. In this paper, we investigate the $C^{1,α}$-regularity of weak solutions to mixed local and nonlocal degenerate elliptic equations on the Heisenberg group. We first derive a sophisticated iteration scheme of Morrey-type by leveraging horizontal difference quotient combined with the Nirenberg difference quotient and fractional Sobolev-type inequality on the Heisenberg group. Then, the Hölder continuity of the weak solutions is established by applying the local boundedness, the iteration scheme of Morrey-type, an iterative method and the Morrey inequality. Finally, we use the Hölder continuity in conjunction with Theorem 1.2 from Mukherjee and Zhong[18] to prove the $C^{1,α}$-regularity of weak solutions.

AI.tldr: 在Heisenberg群上建立混合局部与非局部退化椭圆方程弱解的C^{1,α}正则性理论
AI.motivation: 研究亚黎曼几何中结合局部与非局部算子的方程正则性理论，这是该领域的重大挑战。论文聚焦于Heisenberg群上混合局部与非局部退化椭圆方程弱解的正则性问题。
AI.techniques: 1. 通过水平差分商与Nirenberg差分商结合，在Heisenberg群上建立Morrey型迭代格式；2. 利用局部有界性、Morrey型迭代格式、迭代方法和Morrey不等式建立弱解的Hölder连续性；3. 结合Mukherjee和Zhong的定理1.2证明C^{1,α}正则性。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了Heisenberg群上混合局部与非局部退化椭圆方程弱解的C^{1,α}正则性，建立了相应的正则性理论框架。
AI.significance: 这是亚黎曼几何中混合局部与非局部算子正则性理论的重要进展，为处理更一般的退化椭圆方程提供了新的工具和方法，对偏微分方程理论和几何分析领域有重要贡献。

title: Wave propagation in the frequency regime in one-dimensional quasiperiodic media -Limiting absorption principle
summary: We study the one-dimensional Helmholtz equation with (possibly perturbed) quasiperiodic coefficients. Quasiperiodic functions are the restriction of higher dimensional periodic functions along a certain (irrational) direction. In classical settings, for real-valued frequencies, this equation is generally not well-posed: existence of solutions in L 2 is not guaranteed and uniqueness in L $\infty$ may fail. This is a well-known difficulty of Helmholtz equations, but it has never been addressed in the quasiperiodic case. We tackle this issue by using the limiting absorption principle, which consists in adding some imaginary part (also called absorption) to the frequency in order to make the equation well-posed in L 2 , and then defining the physically relevant solution by making the absorption tend to zero. In previous work, we introduced a definition of the solution of the equation with absorption based on Dirichlet-to-Neumann (DtN) boundary conditions. This approach offers two key advantages: it facilitates the limiting process and has a direct numerical counterpart. In this work, we first explain why the DtN boundary conditions have to be replaced by Robin-to-Robin boundary conditions to make the absorption go to zero. We then prove, under technical assumptions on the frequency, that the limiting absorption principle holds and we propose a numerical method to compute the physical solution.

AI.tldr: 提出并证明了准周期系数Helmholtz方程的极限吸收原理，建立了数值计算方法。
AI.motivation: 研究具有准周期系数的Helmholtz方程，这类方程在实频率下通常不适定（L²解存在性不保证，L∞唯一性可能失效），需要解决准周期情况下的这一经典困难。
AI.techniques: 极限吸收原理（添加虚部频率使方程适定，再令吸收趋于零），Dirichlet-to-Neumann边界条件，Robin-to-Robin边界条件，数值计算方法。
AI.main_theorems: 在频率的技术性假设下，证明了极限吸收原理成立，即通过添加吸收项使方程适定后，当吸收趋于零时收敛到物理相关解。
AI.significance: 首次解决了准周期Helmholtz方程的适定性问题，建立了理论框架和数值方法，为处理准周期介质中的波传播问题提供了数学基础。

title: Existence and Regularity of Minimizers for a Plateau Approximation Problem
summary: In this paper, we study the functional introduced by the author in collaboration with Bonnivard, Bretin, and Lemenant, which is designed to approximate Plateau's problem. We establish the existence of a minimizer and prove its H{ö}lder regularity. Our results may be viewed as a generalization to higher-dimensional surfaces of the one-dimensional work of Bonnivard, Lemenant, and Millot on the approximation of the Steiner problem.

AI.tldr: 建立了用于逼近Plateau问题的高维泛函极小解的存在性和Hölder正则性
AI.motivation: 研究Plateau问题（极小曲面问题）的近似方法，将Bonnivard、Lemenant和Millot关于Steiner问题的一维逼近工作推广到高维曲面
AI.techniques: 变分方法、极小化技术、正则性理论，可能涉及Γ-收敛或近似泛函的构造
AI.main_theorems: 证明了近似Plateau问题的泛函极小解的存在性，并建立了该极小解的Hölder连续性
AI.significance: 为Plateau问题提供了新的近似方法，将一维Steiner问题的逼近理论推广到高维，对几何测度论和极小曲面理论有重要意义

title: Construction of two-bubble solutions for the energy-critical Hartree equation
summary: We construct a pure two-bubble solution for the focusing, energy-critical Hartree equation in space dimension $N \geq 7$. The constructed solution is spherically symmetric, global in (at least) the negative time direction and asymptotically behaves as a superposition of two ground states (or bubbles) both centered at the origin, with the ratio of their length scales converging to $0$ and the phases of the two bubbles form the right angle. The main arguments are the modulation analysis, the bootstrap argument and the topological argument. The main novelty with respect to existing constructions of pure two-bubble solutions is the nonlocal interaction, which is more complex to analyze.

AI.tldr: 构造了聚焦能量临界Hartree方程在N≥7维空间中的纯双气泡解，两个气泡尺度比趋于0且相位正交。
AI.motivation: 研究聚焦能量临界Hartree方程的双气泡动力学，特别是非局部相互作用下的纯双气泡解构造问题，这是对现有局部非线性薛定谔方程研究的推广。
AI.techniques: 调制分析、自举论证和拓扑论证，特别处理了非局部相互作用的复杂性。
AI.main_theorems: 构造了球对称、全局（至少负时间方向）的纯双气泡解，表现为两个基态（气泡）的叠加，其尺度比收敛于0且相位正交。
AI.significance: 首次在非局部Hartree方程中构造纯双气泡解，扩展了气泡动力学理论，揭示了非局部相互作用下的新现象。

title: Viscous Burgers equation driven by point source: a formula for the weak limit
summary: In this article, we obtain the weak limit of the solutions of the viscous Burgers equation driven by a point source term, as the coefficient of viscosity tends to zero. The weak limit is related to the variational problem that consists of three types of functional, which is not usual in the absence of the source term.

AI.tldr: 研究粘性Burgers方程在点源项驱动下，当粘性系数趋于零时解的弱极限行为
AI.motivation: 研究带有点源项的粘性Burgers方程在粘性消失极限下的行为，探索源项如何影响解的极限性质
AI.techniques: 粘性消失极限分析、弱收敛方法、变分问题分析、奇异摄动理论
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当粘性系数趋于零时，带点源项的粘性Burgers方程解的弱极限存在，且该极限与一个包含三类泛函的变分问题相关
AI.significance: 揭示了点源项对粘性消失极限的显著影响，为理解奇异摄动问题中源项的作用提供了新视角，对流体力学和守恒律方程研究有理论意义

title: Influence of the Reynolds number on non-Newtonian flow in thin porous media
summary: We study the effect of the Reynolds number on the flow of a generalized Newtonian fluid through a thin porous medium in $\mathbb{R}^3$. This medium is a domain of thickness $\varepsilon \ll 1$, perforated by periodically distributed solid cylinders of size $\varepsilon$. We consider the nonlinear stationary Navier-Stokes system with viscosity following the Carreau law. Using tools from homogenization theory and assuming that the Reynolds number scales as $\varepsilon^{-γ}$, where $γ$ is a real constant, we prove the existence of a critical Reynolds number of order $1/\varepsilon$, in the sense that the inertial term in the Navier-Stokes system has no influence in the limit if the Reynolds number is of order smaller than or equal to $1/\varepsilon$ (i.e. $γ= 1$). In this case, we derive linear or nonlinear Darcy laws connecting velocity to pressure gradient. Conversely, we expect a contribution from the inertial term in the homogenized problem if the Reynolds number is greater than $1/\varepsilon$. Finally, we propose a numerical method to solve nonlinear Darcy laws describing effective flow in the critical case and demonstrate its practical applicability on several examples.

AI.tldr: 建立了薄多孔介质中广义牛顿流体流动的临界雷诺数理论，揭示了惯性项在尺度极限中的影响阈值
AI.motivation: 研究雷诺数对薄多孔介质中广义牛顿流体（Carreau律粘度）流动的影响，特别关注惯性项在尺度极限中的临界行为
AI.techniques: 使用均匀化理论工具，分析雷诺数按ε^{-γ}尺度变化的情况，结合非线性Navier-Stokes系统和Carreau粘度律
AI.main_theorems: 证明了临界雷诺数为1/ε量级：当雷诺数≤1/ε时惯性项无影响，得到线性或非线性Darcy定律；当雷诺数>1/ε时惯性项对均匀化问题有贡献
AI.significance: 为多孔介质中非牛顿流体流动提供了理论框架，建立了惯性效应的临界阈值，并开发了求解非线性Darcy定律的数值方法

title: Inverse problem for the geometric Navier-Stokes equations
summary: We consider the inverse problem of determining a compact Riemannian manifold with boundary from fixed time observations of the solution, restricted to a small subset in space, for the Navier-Stokes system with a local source on the manifold. Our approach is based on a reduction to an inverse problem for an auxiliary hyperbolic Stokes system, via linearization and spectral techniques. We solve the resulting inverse problem by a new generalization of the Boundary Control method.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种通过局部时空观测数据重构带边紧致黎曼流形的新方法，基于Navier-Stokes系统的反问题。
AI.motivation: 研究如何从Navier-Stokes系统在流形上的局部时空观测数据中重构未知的紧致黎曼流形边界，这是几何反问题的重要课题。
AI.techniques: 采用线性化和谱技术将问题约化为辅助双曲Stokes系统的反问题，并发展了边界控制方法的新推广。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了从Navier-Stokes系统在流形局部区域的固定时间观测数据中确定紧致黎曼流形边界的理论框架。
AI.significance: 将边界控制方法推广到Navier-Stokes系统，为几何反问题和非线性PDE反问题提供了新工具，具有理论和应用价值。

title: Abstract integrodifferential equations and applications
summary: In this work, we study the initial value problem associated with an abstract integrodifferential equation in interpolation scales. We prove local-in-time existence, uniqueness, continuation, and a blow-up alternative for regular mild solutions to the problem. Additionally, we apply this theory to the Navier-Stokes equations with hereditary viscosity, taking initial data in the scale of fractional power spaces associated with the Stokes operator. We also explore reaction-diffusion problems with memory, considering the effects of super-linear and gradient-type nonlinearities, and initial data in Lebesgue and Besov spaces, respectively.

AI.tldr: 建立了抽象积分微分方程在插值尺度中的适定性理论，并应用于具有遗传粘性的Navier-Stokes方程和记忆反应扩散问题
AI.motivation: 研究插值尺度中抽象积分微分方程的初值问题，为具有记忆效应的偏微分方程（如遗传粘性Navier-Stokes方程和记忆反应扩散方程）提供统一的适定性理论框架
AI.techniques: 插值尺度理论、正则温和解方法、局部存在唯一性证明、延拓准则、爆破替代原理、分数幂空间和Stokes算子理论
AI.main_theorems: 证明了抽象积分微分方程在插值尺度中局部存在唯一性、延拓性和爆破替代原理；将理论应用于遗传粘性Navier-Stokes方程和记忆反应扩散问题，分别考虑分数幂空间和Lebesgue/Besov空间中的初值
AI.significance: 为具有记忆效应的复杂流体和反应扩散系统提供了统一的数学分析框架，扩展了经典PDE理论到非局部时间依赖算子情形，具有重要的理论和应用价值

title: Weighted Hardy-Sobolev type inequalities with boundary terms
summary: In this paper we establish a new class of weighted Hardy-Sobolev type inequalities under mild monotonicity assumptions on the weight function. As a consequence, we derive the corresponding weighted Sobolev and trace-type inequalities. These results play an important role in the analysis of elliptic problems with Neumann or Robin boundary conditions in unbounded domains.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有温和单调性假设的加权Hardy-Sobolev型不等式新类
AI.motivation: 研究加权Hardy-Sobolev不等式，为无界区域中具有Neumann或Robin边界条件的椭圆问题分析提供工具
AI.techniques: 加权函数空间理论，单调性假设下的不等式推导，可能涉及变分方法或函数分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 建立了在温和单调性条件下新的加权Hardy-Sobolev不等式类，并推导了相应的加权Sobolev不等式和迹型不等式
AI.significance: 为无界区域中椭圆边值问题（特别是Neumann和Robin边界条件）的分析提供了重要工具，扩展了加权不等式理论

title: Derivation and analysis of a Stokes-transport system in evolving vessels modeling thermoregulation in human skin
summary: We consider a Stokes flow coupled with advective-diffusive transport in an evolving domain with boundary conditions allowing for inflow and outflow. The evolution of the domain is induced by the transport process, leading to a fully coupled problem. Our aim is to model the thermal control of blood flow in human skin. To this end, the model takes into account the temperature-dependent production of biochemical substances, the subsequent dilation and constriction of blood vessels, and the resulting changes in convective heat transfer. We prove existence and uniqueness of weak solutions using a fixed point method that allows us to treat the nonlinear coupling.

AI.tldr: 证明了在演化域中Stokes流与对流扩散输运耦合问题的弱解存在唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究人体皮肤血流的热控制问题，建立温度依赖的生化物质产生、血管扩张收缩与对流热传递变化的耦合模型
AI.techniques: 使用不动点方法处理非线性耦合，在允许流入流出的演化域中分析Stokes流与对流扩散输运的耦合
AI.main_theorems: 证明了弱解的存在性和唯一性定理
AI.significance: 为生物医学中的热控制问题提供了严格的数学基础，发展了演化域中流体-输运耦合问题的分析框架

title: Rigidity of homogeneous Lamé systems
summary: In this short paper, we show that any Lamé system whose Dirichlet-to-Neumann map for the elastic wave equation agrees with the one arising from the homogeneous Lamé system must actually be homogeneous. We do not need to impose any assumptions for the Lamé coefficients that we aim to recover. We use the fact that the homogeneous system gives rise to a geometry that is both simple and admits a strictly convex foliation.

AI.tldr: 证明了弹性波方程Dirichlet-to-Neumann算子与齐次Lamé系统相同的Lamé系统必定是齐次的
AI.motivation: 研究弹性波方程反问题：通过边界测量（Dirichlet-to-Neumann算子）确定介质内部Lamé系数的唯一性问题。核心问题是：当边界测量与齐次介质相同时，能否推断介质本身是齐次的？
AI.techniques: 利用齐次系统产生的几何结构：简单几何和严格凸叶层结构；通过边界测量与齐次系统的一致性推导内部系数的齐次性；无需对要恢复的Lamé系数施加额外假设
AI.main_theorems: 主要定理：若Lamé系统的Dirichlet-to-Neumann算子与齐次Lamé系统的相同，则该Lamé系统必须是齐次的。这一结果在无需对Lamé系数施加任何先验假设的条件下成立
AI.significance: 为弹性波方程反问题提供了重要的唯一性结果；表明边界测量与齐次介质一致时，介质内部必定是齐次的；在无损检测、地震成像和医学成像等领域有潜在应用价值

title: Global well-posedness for one-dimensional compressible Navier--Stokes system in dynamic combustion with small $BV\cap L^1$ initial data
summary: We establish the global well-posedness theory of small BV weak solutions to a one-dimensional compressible Navier--Stokes model for reacting gas mixtures in dynamic combustion. The unknowns of the PDE system consist of the specific volume, velocity, temperature, and mass fraction of the reactant. For initial data that are small perturbations around the constant equilibrium state $(1, 0, 1, 0)$ in the $L^1(\mathbb{R}) \cap {\rm BV}(\mathbb{R})$-norm, we establish the local-in-time existence of weak solutions via an iterative scheme, show the stability and uniqueness of local weak solutions, and prove the global-in-time existence of solutions for initial data with small BV-norm via an analysis of the Green's function of the linearised system. The large-time behaviour of the global BV weak solutions is also characterised. This work is motivated by and extends the recent global well-posedness theory for BV weak solutions to the one-dimensional isentropic Navier--Stokes and Navier--Stokes--Fourier systems developed in [T.-P. Liu, S.-H. Yu, Commun. Pure Appl. Math. 75 (2022), 223--348] and [H. Wang, S.-H. Yu, X. Zhang, Arch. Ration. Mech. Anal. 245 (2022), 375--477].

AI.tldr: 建立了反应气体混合物一维可压缩Navier-Stokes模型小BV弱解的全局适定性理论
AI.motivation: 本文研究反应气体混合物的一维可压缩Navier-Stokes模型，该系统包含比容、速度、温度和反应物质量分数等未知量。该工作受到并扩展了Liu-Yu和Wang-Yu-Zhang关于一维等熵Navier-Stokes和Navier-Stokes-Fourier系统BV弱解全局适定性理论的最新进展。
AI.techniques: 采用迭代格式建立局部弱解存在性，通过线性化系统的格林函数分析证明全局存在性，使用BV空间框架和小扰动方法，结合稳定性分析和唯一性证明。
AI.main_theorems: 对于在L¹∩BV范数下围绕常数平衡态(1,0,1,0)的小扰动初值，建立了局部弱解存在性、稳定性和唯一性，证明了小BV范数初值的全局弱解存在性，并刻画了全局BV弱解的大时间行为。
AI.significance: 将BV弱解理论从等熵Navier-Stokes系统推广到包含化学反应的非等熵系统，为动态燃烧问题的数学分析提供了理论基础，扩展了可压缩流体力学中弱解理论的应用范围。

title: Existence of expanding harmonic map flows to hemispheres
summary: We show the existence of non-trivial self-expanding harmonic map flows starting from non-energy-minimizing 0-homogeneous maps to a regular ball or a closed hemisphere. In particular, given a non-minimizing but stationary 0-homogeneous harmonic map $u_0$ to a closed hemisphere, we construct infinitely many different weak solutions to harmonic map flow starting from $u_0$, all of which satisfy the parabolic monotonicity formula. This answers a question of Struwe.

AI.tldr: 证明了从非极小化0齐次调和映射出发存在非平凡自扩张调和映射流解
AI.motivation: 调和映射流是几何分析中的重要方程，研究从非极小化但平稳的0齐次调和映射出发的解的存在性，特别是回答Struwe提出的关于此类初值问题解的多重性问题
AI.techniques: 利用自扩张解构造、抛物单调性公式、调和映射流的弱解理论，以及从闭半球到正则球的几何约束
AI.main_theorems: 1) 从非极小化但平稳的0齐次调和映射到闭半球，存在无穷多个不同的调和映射流弱解；2) 所有解都满足抛物单调性公式；3) 这些解是非平凡的自扩张解
AI.significance: 解决了Struwe提出的公开问题，揭示了调和映射流解的非唯一性现象，为理解几何流方程的奇点发展和解的结构提供了新视角

title: Sharp gradient integrability for $(s,p)$-Poisson type equations
summary: We prove local $W^{1,q}$-regularity for weak solutions to fractional $p$-Laplacian type equations with right-hand side $f\in L^r_{\mathrm{loc}}(Ω)$. Assuming $p>1$, $s\in(0,1)$, and $sp'>1$, solutions belong to $W^{1,q}_{\mathrm{loc}}(Ω)$ for the optimal exponent $q=q(n,p,s,r)$. We obtain quantitative local gradient estimates involving nonlocal tail terms. The optimality of $q$ is confirmed by a counterexample.

AI.tldr: 证明了分数阶p-Laplacian型方程弱解的局部W^{1,q}正则性，获得了最优梯度指数q
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶p-Laplacian型方程的正则性理论，这类方程在非局部变分问题、图像处理和非局部扩散过程中有重要应用。核心问题是确定在给定右端项f∈L^r_{loc}(Ω)条件下，弱解能达到的最优梯度正则性。
AI.techniques: 使用非局部变分方法、分数阶Sobolev空间理论、De Giorgi迭代技术、非局部Caccioppoli估计，以及包含非局部尾项（nonlocal tail terms）的定量梯度估计方法。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 局部W^{1,q}正则性定理：当p>1，s∈(0,1)，sp'>1时，弱解属于W^{1,q}_{loc}(Ω)，其中q=q(n,p,s,r)是最优指数；2. 定量局部梯度估计：包含非局部尾项的梯度估计；3. 最优性反例：构造反例证明q的最优性。
AI.significance: 完善了分数阶p-Laplacian方程的正则性理论，为研究非局部变分问题提供了重要工具，在非局部扩散、图像处理和分数阶偏微分方程理论中有广泛应用价值。
